tools.name: OpenR (OpenReasoner)
tools.description: Open-source framework for advanced reasoning with LLMs. Integrates test-time computation, RL, and process supervision. Supports Greedy Search, Best-of-N, Beam Search, MCTS, rStar, Critic-MCTS.

tools.name: LLM Reasoners (Maitrix)
tools.description: Library for advanced LLM reasoning. Abstracts reasoning into reward function, world model, and search algorithm. Supports MCTS, DFS/BFS, Beam Search, RAP-MCTS, Tree-of-Thoughts, Guided Decoding.

tools.name: Tree of Thoughts (Princeton NLP)
tools.description: Official NeurIPS 2023 implementation. Maintains a tree of thoughts with BFS/DFS search. LM self-evaluates progress for deliberate reasoning.

tools.name: s1: Simple Test-Time Scaling
tools.description: Simplest approach to test-time scaling. Uses s1K dataset (1000 questions) + budget forcing (terminate/extend thinking with 'Wait' tokens). s1-32B exceeds o1-preview on MATH/AIME24.
tools.focus: budget forcing for test-time compute control

tools.name: rStar / rStar-Math
tools.description: Self-play mutual reasoning for SLMs. Uses MCTS with rich reasoning actions + discriminator SLM for verification. rStar-Math boosts Phi3-mini-3.8B from 41.4% to 86.4% on MATH, surpassing o1-preview.

tools.name: Marco-o1
tools.description: Alibaba's open reasoning model. CoT fine-tuning + MCTS + reflection mechanisms. Explores different action granularities within MCTS. Multiple versions (v1-v3).

tools.name: SLM-MUX
tools.description: Multi-model orchestration for SLMs. Avoids inter-model discussion; selects most reliable output via self-consistency. Model selection search for complementary combinations. 13.4% improvement on MATH.

tools.name: STILL-2 (Slow Thinking with LLMs)
tools.description: SLM trained via imitate-explore-self-improve framework. Distilled long-form thought data enables slow-thinking mode. Iterative dataset refinement for self-improvement.

tools.name: Kiln AI
tools.description: Build, evaluate, optimize AI systems. Reasoning/CoT support with separate thinking/answer storage. Enables distilling reasoning from large models to small, fast thinking models.

tools.name: Dynasor
tools.description: Reasoning-aware serving system. Uses Certaindex to measure reasoning progress. Dynamically allocates compute per query difficulty. 50% compute savings, 3.3x throughput gains.

tools.name: NVIDIA Dynamo
tools.description: Datacenter-scale distributed inference serving. Disaggregated prefill/decode, intelligent routing, memory management. Supports SGLang, TensorRT-LLM, vLLM backends.
tools.focus: distributed inference serving for reasoning models

tools.name: vLLM
tools.description: High-performance LLM inference and serving. PagedAttention, continuous batching, speculative decoding support. Industry standard for high-throughput inference.

tools.name: SGLang
tools.description: High-performance serving framework. Radix tree KV cache, structured output, multi-turn optimization. De facto standard with 400k+ GPU deployments.

tools.name: DeepSeek-R1
tools.description: 671B MoE (37B active). Matches o1 at 70% lower cost. Extended CoT reasoning with 10-100x more tokens per query. Distilled versions available (1.5B-70B).

tools.name: QwQ-32B / Qwen3
tools.description: 32B parameter reasoning model matching DeepSeek-R1. Test-time compute scaling with step-by-step reasoning. Qwen3-30B-A3B (MoE) outperforms QwQ-32B.

tools.name: Phi-4 Reasoning (Microsoft)
tools.description: 14B reasoning model rivaling much larger models. Phi-4-mini-reasoning (3.8B) outperforms models 2x its size. SFT on o3-mini demonstrations + RL for inference-time compute.
tools.focus: small reasoning model via distillation + RL

tools.name: OpenAI o1/o3/o4-mini
tools.description: Pioneered test-time compute scaling. Internal chain-of-thought reasoning. o3-mini offers smaller/cheaper reasoning. Deliberative alignment + test-time search.

tools.name: Math-Shepherd
tools.description: Process reward model for step-by-step math verification. Auto-constructed process-wise supervision data. 4x larger than PRM800K. Used with axolotl for PRM training.

tools.name: ThinkPRM / GenPRM
tools.description: Process reward models that think - scaling verification compute. Generative PRMs that reason before scoring. Better performance with fewer process labels.

tools.name: Speculative Decoding (EAGLE-3, SparseSpec, OSD)
tools.description: Draft-target approach using smaller models to propose tokens verified by larger models. 2-3x speedup. EAGLE-3 uses lightweight prediction head. Native support in vLLM/TensorRT-LLM.

tools.name: ReaLM
tools.description: Reflection-Enhanced Autonomous Reasoning with Small Language Models. Enables SLMs to self-reflect and improve reasoning at inference time.

tools.name: ThetaEvolve
tools.description: Simplifies and extends AlphaEvolve for test-time learning. Scales in-context learning and RL at test time. Models continually learn from experiences.
